title: ITALY enforcement action against Comune di Cassino (2,500)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 2,500 on the Comune di Cassino. The controller publishes its decisions for transparency purposes. However, the controller published a decision that included the personal data of a data subject, including income data. This was not covered by the purpose...
